name: Juniper
description: Juniper came from a need for a cooler companion to Hawthorn. It keeps the same mood and underexposed look, but tones down the autumnal warmth. Hawthorn leans warmer and more seasonal: greys drift toward brown, highlights pick up a subtle amber cast, and greens skew olive. Juniper shifts the palette toward colder, cleaner tones: neutrals sit closer to their natural look, shadows feel more blue-green, and greens lean more pine than olive.
author: Mihai Serban
